Reach out to alice.johnson@example.com with any questions about the proposal. For urgent matters, call +1 (415) 555-0142 and confirm the payment card 4111 1111 1111 1111 is on file.

Wire transfers use IBAN GB29 NWBK 6016 1331 9268 19. The customer's US tax id is 123-45-6789. Our staging API runs at 192.168.1.42.
